nasb.text: and the priest shall dip his finger in the blood and sprinkle it seven times before the Lord, in front of the veil.

esv.text: and the priest shall dip his finger in the blood and sprinkle it seven times before the Lord in front of the veil.

cnv.text: 祭司要把指頭蘸在血裡，在耶和華面前，向著幔子，彈血七次；

ccb.text: 在耶和华面前用手指蘸血向幔子弹洒七次，
